fields.name: report_date
fields.description: Date the laboratory report was finalized/issued, format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: collection_date
fields.description: Date the specimen was collected from the patient, format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: received_date
fields.description: Date the specimen was received by the laboratory, format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: ordering_provider_name
fields.description: Full name of the clinician who ordered the tests

fields.name: ordering_provider_npi
fields.description: NPI of the ordering provider — 10-digit numeric; null if not printed on report

fields.name: patient_name
fields.description: Full name of the patient

fields.name: patient_dob
fields.description: Patient date of birth, format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: patient_mrn
fields.description: Patient Medical Record Number assigned by the ordering facility

fields.name: lab_name
fields.description: Name of the laboratory that performed the testing

fields.name: lab_clia_number
fields.description: CLIA certificate number of the performing laboratory (format: two-digit state code + 7 digits, e.g., "45D0123456")

fields.name: specimen_type
fields.description: Type of biological specimen tested. One of: Blood | Urine | Swab | CSF | Stool | Sputum | Tissue | Pleural_Fluid | Serum | Plasma | Other

fields.name: test_results
fields.description: Array of individual test result objects. For each test result line, extract:

fields.name: test_name
fields.description: Name of the test as printed on the report (e.g., "Hemoglobin", "Glucose", "Creatinine")

fields.name: loinc_code
fields.description: LOINC code if printed on report (e.g., "718-7"); null if not present

fields.name: result_value
fields.description: The result value as a string (e.g., "14.2", ">1000", "POSITIVE", "RESISTANT")

fields.name: unit
fields.description: Unit of measure (e.g., "g/dL", "mg/dL", "K/uL"). Null for qualitative results

fields.name: reference_range
fields.description: Normal reference range as a string (e.g., "13.5-17.5", "<100", "Negative"). Null if not provided

fields.name: flag
fields.description: Abnormality flag. One of: H (High) | L (Low) | C (Critical) | null (Normal/Not flagged)

fields.name: status
fields.description: Result status. One of: Final | Preliminary | Corrected | Cancelled

fields.name: overall_status
fields.description: Overall status of the lab report. One of: Final | Preliminary | Corrected | Cancelled

fields.name: critical_values_present
fields.description: Boolean — true if ANY result in this report has a Critical (C) flag or is labeled "Critical Value" or "Panic Value" in the report

fields.name: pathologist_name
fields.description: Name of the reviewing/verifying pathologist or laboratory director if signed on report. Null if not present

fields.name: clinical_notes
fields.description: Free-text comments, interpretation notes, or footnotes appended to the report by the laboratory. Maximum 400 characters. Null if none

sections.title: Dates And Terms
sections.description: Dates And Terms fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Document Details
sections.description: Document Details fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Financials
sections.description: Financials fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Parties
sections.description: Parties fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Risk And Compliance
sections.description: Risk And Compliance fields extracted from the document.

completeness_checklist.description: All required fields are present or explicitly null with low confidence when absent.
Each declared section was reviewed for extractable evidence.
Object array fields use their item_schema for consistent nested extraction.
